title: Modern House Listing Photography — Post-Production Color Grade & Listing Export
one_line_ask: Edit the client's three supplied room frames (living room, kitchen, bedroom) into clean, modern, naturally-lit real-estate listing photos with straight verticals and corrected color, then export each in web-optimized JPEG (<2 MB) and full-resolution TIFF for Airbnb/Zillow.

issues: Horizon tilt is present but subtle — may be slightly under the 2.5° target, though acceptable
Wall scuff and dust speck are faint and may require close inspection to locate — borderline on visibility for a source asset
Converging verticals are mild rather than pronounced, though consistent with a moderate wide-angle rather than ultra-wide
Mixed white balance (warm left / cool right) is well executed and clearly present
Corner shadow underexposure is present but very gentle — still functional as a correction target
Small items on coffee table and shelving could be interpreted as branded products but are not identifiable at this resolution

The image perfectly captures the requested 'deliberately imperfect' qualities, such as the slight tilt, color cast, mild underexposed shadows, and faint scuffs, which are intended for a starting asset and not to be penalized.
All specified elements like stainless-steel appliances, quartz countertop, blonde-wood floor, and minimalist styling are accurately depicted.
No severe AI artifacts or real-world brands/logos are visible.
Vertical cabinet edges show mild lean/tilt consistent with brief (~2deg handheld effect, intentional)
Warm-cool colour cast visible — yellow overhead vs cool daylight from window (intentional per brief)
Mild shadow underexposure under upper cabinets (intentional per brief)
Slight soft edge on tall cabinet left frame (acceptable source-file quality)
No clearly visible dust smudge or cabinet scuff detectable at this resolution — designer may need to zoom to locate target for spot-fix task
Bed is slightly unmade/rumpled which adds authenticity but could be seen as staging imperfection
Nightstand lamp is on adding warm cast as briefed — mixed WB present and correct
Window blow-out present and correct
Slight tilt present and correct (~2-3 degrees)
Converging verticals on window frame present and correct
Interior shadow/dark zones present and correct
Wishbone chair partially visible at right edge — minor compositional crop issue but acceptable for source asset
No severe AI artifacts detected — forms, edges, furniture geometry all coherent
Faint wall mark near headboard area visible and correct per brief
Blonde wood floor present and correct
